name: Cook
description: Skill in selecting, planning, and preparing meals.
failureResults: The cooked food is not properly prepared. It is edible but tastes bad (greasy, too spicy, sour, burnt, leaves a bad after-taste in mouth, etc.).

name: Dance
description: A practiced skill in the art of dancing. The character is especially smooth and graceful, a joy to dance with.

unquantifiedMechanics.summary: Can learn new dance steps/moves much more quickly than somebody who can not dance.
unquantifiedMechanics.appliesWhen: When learning new dance steps or moves.

name: Fishing
description: The fundamental methods and enjoyment of the relaxing sport of fishing. Areas of knowledge include the use of lures, bait, poles, hooks, lines, and the cleaning and preparation of fish for eating. Also includes a basic knowledge of freshwater fish, their habits and taste.

name: Gardening
description: Basic understanding of plant care, aesthetic garden design, growing garden crops, and creating decorative gardens with flowers, plants, shrubs, trees, and decorative rocks that create a feeling of tranquility and harmony with nature. This skill can be practiced by anyone, but selecting it twice provides a +12% bonus and the skill is that of a professional groundskeeper.

successOutcomes.summary: Healthy garden crops and attractive decorative gardens with thoughtful plant placement, shrubs, trees, and decorative rock features.

failureResults.summary: Plants fail to thrive, the layout looks haphazard, or crop yield is poor for the season.

repeatSelection.summary: Selecting the skill twice provides a +12% bonus and professional groundskeeper quality.

categoryTrackInteraction.summary: Uses the book's +12% second-selection bonus instead of the standard Domestic category +10%.

repeatSelection.summary: Gardening uses +12% on second selection per the Survival Guide instead of inherited Domestic +10%.

name: Housekeeping
description: Techniques and methods of cleaning clothes, bedding, bathrooms, floors, and surfaces, as well as knowledge of the types of cleaners, solvents, soaps and materials for housekeeping. Professional maintenance personnel, maids, and hotel housekeepers know additional tricks of the trade to make a room look spotless, sparkling and inviting; everything in its place, folded properly and presented attractively.

narrativeAdvantages.summary: Professional maintenance personnel, maids, and hotel housekeepers know additional tricks of the trade for spotless, sparkling, inviting presentation.
narrativeAdvantages.appliesWhen: When the character has professional housekeeping experience or background.

successOutcomes.summary: Clothes, bedding, bathrooms, floors, and surfaces are clean; rooms look spotless, sparkling, and inviting with items in their place, folded properly, and presented attractively.

failureResults.summary: Cleaning is incomplete, streaks or stains remain, or the room still looks untidy and uninviting.

name: Play Musical Instrument
description: The individual has learned to play a particular musical instrument with a fair amount of skill. The sound is generally pleasant. Note that each specific instrument requires the selection of this skill. For example: a character who can play the guitar, violin, and harmonica must select the play musical instrument skill three different times.

repeatSelection.summary: Grants the Domestic category professional quality bonus to the specific instrument chosen when selected twice.

categoryTrackInteraction.summary: Applies the inherited +10% category professional quality bonus to the specific parameterized instrument instance.

name: Sewing
description: The practiced skill with the needle and thread to mend clothing, do minor alterations, and layout, cut and sew simple patterns. This is not a tailoring ability, but can become tailoring if the player selects this skill twice.

repeatSelection.summary: Selecting this skill twice makes it tailoring.

categoryTrackInteraction.summary: Inherits the +10% professional quality from the Domestic category and also upgrades the classification to tailoring.

name: Sing
description: The simple ability to read music and carry a pleasant tune.

name: Wardrobe & Grooming

synergies.description: +2% bonus to Disguise when dressed to impress.

applicability.appliesWhen: Character has applied Wardrobe & Grooming to create the intended look.

synergies.description: +2% bonus to Undercover Ops when dressed to impress.

applicability.appliesWhen: Character has applied Wardrobe & Grooming to create the intended look.

synergies.description: +2% bonus to Seduction when dressed to impress.

applicability.appliesWhen: Character has applied Wardrobe & Grooming to create the intended look.

description: Knowledge of clothing, make-up, hair style, perfume, walking, talking, and how one carries oneself to create a particular look or style. In short, this is how to dress to kill or make the right impression. Keeps an eye on fashion and trends.

successOutcomes.summary: Creates a convincing look or style through clothing, grooming, poise, and presentation — dressed to impress with +1 P.B. and +2% to Disguise, Undercover Ops, and Seduction while that look holds.
